The text mentions "Aunt Mei (Xie X)", while the image identifies the perpetrator as "Zhang Weiping" (who is the main suspect mentioned in the text). Despite this mismatch in the specific image shown vs the text's referenced caption, the image provided *visually supports* the core news event described in the text (the arrest of Aunt Mei and Zhang Weiping) and confirms the "20-year" timeline. Consistency in key facts suggests support.

The headline in the image explicitly reads "梅姨落网 全过程揭秘" and "20年悬案梅姨终落网", which perfectly corresponds to the news text announcing the capture of "Aunt Mei" (梅姨) after "over 20 years" of evasion. The visual and textual information consistently describe the same event.
